title: Return and Refund Policy for Vendor Purchase Orders
content: Hexaware's return and refund policy allows vendors to request returns within 30 calendar days of goods receipt. The return must reference the original Purchase Order (PO) number and include a valid reason code. Accepted reason codes are: DEFECTIVE (manufacturing defect), WRONG_ITEM (incorrect item shipped), DAMAGED (damaged during transit), and EXCESS (quantity exceeds order). To initiate a return, vendors must submit a Return Material Authorization (RMA) request through the VQMS portal or by emailing vendor-support@hexaware.com with the subject line 'RMA Request — PO-XXXX'. Once the RMA is approved, the vendor will receive an RMA number and shipping instructions within 2 business days. Refunds are processed within 15 business days of receiving the returned goods at our warehouse. Credit notes are issued against the original invoice. For partial returns, the refund amount is prorated based on the quantity returned. Vendors with PLATINUM or GOLD tier status receive expedited processing (5 business days). Items returned without an RMA number will be rejected at the dock. Restocking fees of 15% apply to EXCESS returns unless the overshipping was caused by Hexaware's fulfillment error. Contact finance-ops for refund status inquiries.
